userText: we are conducting a plan that can improve our development effiency.
correctedText: We are conducting a review to improve our development efficiency.
generalAdvice: 你对 conducting 的核心感觉还不稳，而且 conducting 后面的搭配需要更自然。先把 conducting a review / conducting research / conducting a survey 这些固定块记住。

issues.note: conducting a plan 不自然；conduct 更常和 review, survey, research, experiment, interview 搭配。
issues.suggestion: 优先记固定块：conduct a review, conduct research, conduct a survey, conduct an experiment。

issues.note: effiency 拼写错误，应为 efficiency。
issues.suggestion: 注意 efficiency 是 effi-cien-cy。可以顺手连成块记：improve efficiency。
